title: Just Copper Tools
description: Copper tools with a small feature
body:
Requires [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) 9.1.12

For Fabric
Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 0.86.1

This mod adds
* All types of tools made of copper. The main feature of copper tools is that they can be repaired using copper ore or copper ingots directly in the inventory through crafting.
* Copper Hopper, which sorts items.
* Copper item stand.
